nasb.text: Then he brought the bull of the sin offering, and Aaron and his sons laid their hands on the head of the bull of the sin offering.

esv.text: Then he brought the bull of the sin offering, and Aaron and his sons laid their hands on the head of the bull of the sin offering.

cnv.text: 他把贖罪祭的公牛牽來；亞倫和他的兒子按手在贖罪祭的公牛的頭上。

ccb.text: 摩西牵来那头作赎罪祭的公牛，亚伦父子们把手放在牛头上。
